mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORT ( REPORT_ID, CLASS_ID, STUDENT_ID, TEACHER_ID, REPORT_TYPE, PERIOD_TYPE, START_DATE, END_DATE, TITLE, REPORT_CONTENT, COMENT, ATTACH_URL, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{reportId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{classId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{studentId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{teacherId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{reportType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{periodType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportContent, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{coment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attachUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO REPORT_VIEW ( REPORT_VIEW_ID, REPORT_ID, VIEWER_ID, VIEWER_AT ) VALUES ( #{reportViewId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{reportId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{viewerId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE )

sql.if: AND ( (#{periodFilter} = 'THIS_MONTH' AND TRUNC(R.START_DATE, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')) OR (#{periodFilter} = 'LAST_MONTH' AND TRUNC(R.START_DATE, 'MM') = ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -1)) OR (#{periodFilter} = 'THIS_WEEK' AND TRUNC(R.START_DATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 6) OR (#{periodFilter} = 'LAST_WEEK' AND TRUNC(R.START_DATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') - 7 AND TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') - 1) )

mapper.select: SELECT R.REPORT_ID, R.CLASS_ID, R.STUDENT_ID, CASE WHEN R.REPORT_TYPE = 'CLASS' THEN '학급 전체' ELSE S.STUDENT_NAME END AS STUDENT_NAME, T.TEACHER_NAME AS TEACHER_NAME, R.REPORT_TYPE, R.PERIOD_TYPE, R.TITLE, TO_CHAR(R.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(R.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, TO_CHAR(R.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT, CASE WHEN R.REPORT_TYPE = 'CLASS' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT RV.VIEWER_ID) FROM REPORT_VIEW RV WHERE RV.REPORT_ID = R.REPORT_ID AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STUDENT_PARENT SP, STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SP.PARENT_ID = RV.VIEWER_ID AND NVL(SP.LINK_STATUS, 1) = 1 AND SC.STUDENT_ID = SP.STUDENT_ID AND SC.CLASS_ID = R.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) ) ELSE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT_VIEW RV, STUDENT_PARENT SP WHERE RV.REPORT_ID = R.REPORT_ID AND SP.PARENT_ID = RV.VIEWER_ID AND SP.STUDENT_ID = R.STUDENT_ID AND NVL(SP.LINK_STATUS, 1) = 1 ) END AS PARENT_VIEW_COUNT, CASE WHEN R.REPORT_TYPE = 'CLASS' THEN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(RV.VIEWER_AT), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') FROM REPORT_VIEW RV WHERE RV.REPORT_ID = R.REPORT_ID AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STUDENT_PARENT SP, STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SP.PARENT_ID = RV.VIEWER_ID AND NVL(SP.LINK_STATUS, 1) = 1 AND SC.STUDENT_ID = SP.STUDENT_ID AND SC.CLASS_ID = R.CLASS_ID AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ) ) ELSE ( SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(RV.VIEWER_AT), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') FROM REPORT_VIEW RV, STUDENT_PARENT SP WHERE RV.REPORT_ID = R.REPORT_ID AND SP.PARENT_ID = RV.VIEWER_ID AND SP.STUDENT_ID = R.STUDENT_ID AND NVL(SP.LINK_STATUS, 1) = 1 ) END AS PARENT_VIEWED_AT FROM REPORT R LEFT JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = R.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = R.TEACHER_ID WHERE R.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND R.TEACHER_ID = #{teacherId} ORDER BY R.START_DATE DESC, R.CREATED_AT DESC, R.REPORT_ID DESC

SELECT R.REPORT_ID, R.CLASS_ID, R.STUDENT_ID, CASE WHEN R.REPORT_TYPE = 'CLASS' THEN '학급 전체' ELSE S.STUDENT_NAME END AS STUDENT_NAME, T.TEACHER_NAME AS TEACHER_NAME, R.REPORT_TYPE, R.PERIOD_TYPE, R.TITLE, TO_CHAR(R.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(R.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, TO_CHAR(R.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT, 0 AS PARENT_VIEW_COUNT, NULL AS PARENT_VIEWED_AT FROM REPORT R LEFT JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = R.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = R.TEACHER_ID WHERE R.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND ( R.REPORT_TYPE = 'CLASS' OR (R.REPORT_TYPE = 'PERSONAL' AND R.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId}) )
ORDER BY R.START_DATE DESC, R.CREATED_AT DESC, R.REPORT_ID DESC

SELECT R.REPORT_ID, R.CLASS_ID, R.STUDENT_ID, CASE WHEN R.REPORT_TYPE = 'CLASS' THEN '학급 전체' ELSE S.STUDENT_NAME END AS STUDENT_NAME, T.TEACHER_NAME AS TEACHER_NAME, R.REPORT_TYPE, R.PERIOD_TYPE, R.TITLE, TO_CHAR(R.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(R.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, TO_CHAR(R.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT_VIEW RV WHERE RV.REPORT_ID = R.REPORT_ID AND RV.VIEWER_ID = #{parentId} ) AS PARENT_VIEW_COUNT, ( SELECT TO_CHAR(MAX(RV.VIEWER_AT), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') FROM REPORT_VIEW RV WHERE RV.REPORT_ID = R.REPORT_ID AND RV.VIEWER_ID = #{parentId} ) AS PARENT_VIEWED_AT FROM REPORT R LEFT JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = R.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = R.TEACHER_ID WHERE R.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND ( R.REPORT_TYPE = 'CLASS' OR ( R.REPORT_TYPE = 'PERSONAL' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STUDENT_PARENT SP WHERE SP.STUDENT_ID = R.STUDENT_ID AND SP.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND NVL(SP.LINK_STATUS, 1) = 1 ) ) )
AND ( R.REPORT_TYPE = 'CLASS' OR R.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} )
ORDER BY R.START_DATE DESC, R.CREATED_AT DESC, R.REPORT_ID DESC

SELECT DISTINCT S.STUDENT_ID, S.STUDENT_NAME, C.CLASS_NAME, C.GRADE, C.CLASS_NO FROM STUDENT_PARENT SP JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = SP.STUDENT_ID JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.STUDENT_ID = SP.STUDENT_ID AND SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL JOIN CLASS C ON C.CLASS_ID = SC.CLASS_ID WHERE SP.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND NVL(SP.LINK_STATUS, 1) = 1 ORDER BY S.STUDENT_NAME ASC, S.STUDENT_ID ASC

SELECT R.REPORT_ID, R.CLASS_ID, R.STUDENT_ID, CASE WHEN R.REPORT_TYPE = 'CLASS' THEN '학급 전체' ELSE S.STUDENT_NAME END AS STUDENT_NAME, T.TEACHER_NAME AS TEACHER_NAME, C.CLASS_NAME, R.REPORT_TYPE, R.PERIOD_TYPE, R.TITLE, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(R.REPORT_CONTENT, 4000, 1) AS REPORT_CONTENT, R.COMENT, R.ATTACH_URL, TO_CHAR(R.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(R.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE, TO_CHAR(R.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT FROM REPORT R LEFT JOIN STUDENT S ON S.STUDENT_ID = R.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN TEACHER T ON T.TEACHER_ID = R.TEACHER_ID LEFT JOIN CLASS C ON C.CLASS_ID = R.CLASS_ID WHERE R.REPORT_ID = #{reportId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SP.STUDENT_ID) FROM STUDENT_PARENT SP JOIN STUDENT_CLASS SC ON SC.STUDENT_ID = SP.STUDENT_ID AND SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL WHERE SP.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND NVL(SP.LINK_STATUS, 1) = 1
